Container.Name: AllMightyDLP
Container.Overview: AllMightyDLP is a self-hosted yt-dlp web app for personal media downloads. Paste a supported URL, inspect it, and retrieve direct download links for finished files from a mobile-friendly interface.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Container port for the AllMightyDLP web interface

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent application state and future metadata cache

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Completed downloads exposed by the web UI

Config.Name: App Title
Config.Description: Visible app name in the web UI

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Optional public base URL used to render absolute download links

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Jobs
Config.Description: Maximum number of simultaneous yt-dlp jobs

Config.Name: Cleanup Age Minutes
Config.Description: Automatically remove finished jobs and files older than this many minutes

Config.Name: Allow Playlists
Config.Description: Set to false to force single-item downloads only

Config.Name: Default Profile
Config.Description: Startup selection for the UI profile picker: video, audio, or original

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: Optional Basic Auth username to protect the web interface

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Optional Basic Auth password to protect the web interface

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Unraid user id for future permission alignment

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Unraid group id for future permission alignment

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File creation mask inside the container
